title: Amtech C0605 Tubular Box Spanner with Tommy bar
features: FOR NARROW SPACES: This double-ended tubular box spanner and Tommy bar is ideal for loosening or tightening nuts and bolts in narrow recesses
SIZES: The spanner length is 175mm with a 2mm thickness, while the tommy bar is 175mm in length
DURABLE: It is made from hardened, heat-treated carbon steel for durability
PRECISION CUTTING: Provides smooth and accurate results
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description This double-ended tubular box spanner and Tommy bar is ideal for loosening or tightening nuts and bolts in narrow recesses. Made from hardened, heat-treated carbon steel for durability, the spanner is 175mm long, with a 2mm thickness, while the tommy bar is 175mm in length. Safety Warning No
